message:
🐛 Fix EPG mapping display, add recordings, sidebar actions, user agent (#54)

- 24/7 channels and 0% confidence now correctly shown as unmapped
- EPG mapping back button navigates to settings (not channels)
- ESC key works on EPG mapping screen
- EPG programme text clamped to stay visible in guide view
- Buffer size options include None and size labels (Small/Medium/Large/XL)
- User agent setting with presets (VLC, Kodi, ExoPlayer, etc.)
- Recording location with local folder and network share support (SMB/NFS/AFP/FTP/WebDAV)
- Recording help dialog with step-by-step instructions
- Sidebar quick actions: Recordings, Play File, Play URL
- Web remote shows actual local IP address
- macOS file read-write entitlements for backup/restore
- Remove cast icon from channel toolbar (available in fullscreen player)
- Remove unused imports (cast_service, cast_dialog, channel_info_overlay)
- Search text visible in EPG mapping screen

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
